description: Configure Weasis to display two widely separated slices of the same 10-slice CT series side-by-side in a 1x2 layout with slice synchronization disabled. Display a slice from the beginning of the series in the left pane and a slice from the end in the right pane. Save a screenshot of the workspace to ~/DICOM/exports/async_comparison.png and a text file containing 'async_done' to ~/DICOM/exports/task_complete.txt.
